title: APM: Total Browser Attacks (24h)
description: KPI tile counting every SOC Application Logs record carrying an Attack Type tag in the last 24 hours. Headline metric for executive dashboards.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Attack Type' != null | timestats span = 1hour count as Attacks

ask_ai_prompts: What is driving the browser attack volume right now?
Compare last 24h attacks to the previous day.
